content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.multimodal.affective_engine
FILE: cosmos/core/multimodal/affective_engine.py (256 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: AFFECTIVE ENGINE (EMOTIONAL LAYER)
===================================
Maps emotions to 12D state space and modulates learning.
Emotions are configurations in the 12D state space.

CLASSES:
- EmotionalState: Emotional state in 12D framework
  Methods: def to_12d_modulation(self)
  Methods: def classify_emotion(self)
- CognitiveProcessor: Generate thoughts from state space dynamics
  Methods: def observe_state_transition(self, old_state, new_state, input_description)
  Methods: def get_stream_of_consciousness(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def detect_emotion_from_audio(audio_token)
- def detect_emotion_from_vision(visual_token)
- def detect_emotion_from_text(text)
